flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Maharishi International University are 50% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($28.0k vs $55.4k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 35 pp at Maharishi International University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (17.6% vs 52.8%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Maharishi International University fell 22% between 2021 and 2024 (79.0% → 61.3%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Maharishi International University rose 94% between 2021 and 2024 (20.0% → 38.9%).
